name: Xenogeneic mitochondrial transplantation in mouse aging phenotypes
summary: A mouse study testing xenogeneic mitochondrial transplantation for selected age-associated phenotypes and mitochondrial functional readouts, with donor mitochondrial damage experiments that constrain quality-control interpretation.
model_system: Mice receiving xenogeneic donor mitochondrial preparations, with the most detailed evidence reported for yak-derived xeno-MT
